docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ETZLER, STUART
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT IN PRO PER. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED BY BOTH PARTIES AND RETURNED. CLERK: B. PAREDES, NOT REPORTED (506)
